subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, my Hope and ultimate Aspiration! These are servants who have sought shelter in Thy mighty stronghold and have taken refuge in Thy sanctuary [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و رجائی و غاية آمالی هؤلاء عباد التجئوا الی کهفک المنيع و آووا الی ملاذک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @development of capacity and readiness
